testsuite.name: com.kilu.pocketagent.HubQueueContractTest

testcase.name: pollQueue does NOT return emptyList when server sends wrapper
pollQueue returns emptyList on malformed JSON (bare array)
pollQueue returns emptyList and triggers auth failure on 401
pollQueue returns emptyList and triggers auth failure on 403
pollQueue returns items from wrapper response
pollQueue returns emptyList on 500 server error
pollQueue returns empty list when items array is empty

testsuite.system-out: [ControlPlaneApi] D: pollQueue ok items=1 [ControlPlaneApi] D: pollQueue ok items=1 [ControlPlaneApi] D: pollQueue ok items=0
testsuite.system-err: [ControlPlaneApi] E: pollQueue parse/fetch error kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.JsonDecodingException: Unexpected JSON token at offset 0: Expected start of the object '{', but had '[' instead at path: $ JSON input: [{"task_id":"tsk_1","grant_id":"gr_1"}] at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.JsonExceptionsKt.JsonDecodingException(JsonExceptions.kt:24) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.JsonExceptionsKt.JsonDecodingException(JsonExceptions.kt:32) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.AbstractJsonLexer.fail(AbstractJsonLexer.kt:598) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.AbstractJsonLexer.fail$default(AbstractJsonLexer.kt:596) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.AbstractJsonLexer.fail$kotlinx_serialization_json(AbstractJsonLexer.kt:233) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.AbstractJsonLexer.fail$kotlinx_serialization_json$default(AbstractJsonLexer.kt:228) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.AbstractJsonLexer.unexpectedToken(AbstractJsonLexer.kt:225) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.StringJsonLexer.consumeNextToken(StringJsonLexer.kt:74) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.StreamingJsonDecoder.beginStructure(StreamingJsonDecoder.kt:102) at com.kilu.pocketagent.shared.models.HubQueueListResponse$$serializer.deserialize(HubModels.kt:6) at com.kilu.pocketagent.shared.models.HubQueueListResponse$$serializer.deserialize(HubModels.kt:6) at kotlinx.serialization.json.internal.StreamingJsonDecoder.decodeSerializableValue(StreamingJsonDecoder.kt:69) at kotlinx.serialization.json.Json.decodeFromString(Json.kt:107) at pollQueue http=500
